feat.name: May Death Itself Reconsider
feat.text: Your will is so steadfast that even death can’t stop you. You gain the ability to cast *breath of life* up to three times per day as a 5th-rank divine innate spell.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
